overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator showing a first-person driver's view during heavy rainfall. The bus drives through a European city street lined with apartment buildings, stops at a red traffic light behind a white sedan, then continues through the intersection as the light turns green. Windshield wipers operate continuously throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with residential towers

events.description: bus slows down approaching red traffic light behind white sedan
bus comes to complete stop behind white car at traffic light

agents.ego_description: driving bus through heavy rain on city street, slowing to stop at red light behind white sedan

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at red light ahead of bus, brake lights on

entered.detail: tall concrete residential towers lining the left side of the street
tall concrete residential towers lining the right side of the street
row of deciduous trees along the left sidewalk
row of deciduous trees along the right sidewalk
overhead traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red
white lane divider lines on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through heavy rain on a multi-lane city street lined with concrete apartment buildings and trees. The windshield wipers move continuously as the vehicle approaches a red traffic light. The bus slows down and comes to a complete stop behind a white sedan waiting at the intersection.

agents.ego_description: waiting at red traffic light with windshield wipers active, observing the white sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped directly ahead at red light with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: covered glass and metal bus stop shelter on the left sidewalk
row of various colored cars parked along the right curb

segments.scene_description: The bus remains stationary at the red traffic light behind the white sedan, with brake lights illuminated ahead. Rain continues to fall heavily, and the wipers maintain a steady rhythm. A bus stop shelter is visible on the left sidewalk while parked cars line the right side of the street.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
bus accelerates from stationary position through the intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection as the traffic light turns green, following the white sedan

notable_agents.action: white sedan accelerating through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: zebra crossing white stripes painted on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The traffic light changes from red to green, and the bus begins accelerating through the wet intersection. The white sedan ahead pulls forward and drives through the crossing. The bus passes over the zebra crosswalk markings as it gains speed while windshield wipers continue sweeping.

agents.ego_description: driving down the wet multi-lane street at steady speed, passing commercial buildings and parked vehicles

entered.detail: commercial storefronts with large glass windows on the right side of the street
second covered bus stop shelter visible further down on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus continues driving down the city street, passing by storefronts on the right and another bus stop shelter on the left. The road remains wet with visible puddles reflecting the overcast sky. The vehicle maintains a steady speed through the urban environment with parked cars visible along the right curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle moves through a rain-drenched city street and comes to a halt at a traffic intersection. It begins with the bus cruising past concrete apartment buildings and trees under a heavy downpour, with windshield wipers operating in a steady rhythm. As the vehicle approaches a red light, the camera captures the bus slowing down and coming to a complete stop directly behind a white sedan. The scene then settles into a stationary view, highlighting the illuminated brake lights of the car ahead and the rain-streaked glass. Finally, the perspective lingers on the surrounding urban environment, revealing a bus stop shelter on the left sidewalk and a row of parked cars lining the right side of the street.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a bus accelerates from a standstill into a steady drive through a rain-slicked city street. It begins at a traffic light that shifts from red to green, prompting the bus to move forward as a white sedan pulls away through the intersection. As the vehicle passes over the zebra crosswalk markings, the camera maintains a forward trajectory while windshield wipers sweep across the glass. The scene then expands to reveal the surrounding urban environment, gliding past storefronts on the right and a bus stop shelter on the left. Finally, the bus maintains a steady speed along the wet road, passing parked cars and puddles that reflect the overcast sky.
